result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 9:   WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.en...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT 
    TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
case_in_range AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = c.id
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND btrim(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT 
    TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
case_in_range AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = c.id
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND btrim(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT 
    TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
case_in_range AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = c.id
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND btrim(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT 
    TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10' AS start_dt,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
case_in_range AS (
  SELECT c.id
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE (c.createddate::timestamp) >= p.start_dt AND (c.createddate::timestamp) < p.end_dt
),
owner_changes AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = ch.caseid__c
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(old_owner)
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN case_in_range cir ON cir.id = c.id
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND btrim(c.ownerid) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id
  FROM owner_changes
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT ha.agent_id,
         COALESCE(tc.transfer_count,0) AS transfer_count
  FROM handled_agents ha
  LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = ha.agent_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM agent_counts
WHERE agent_id IS NOT NULL AND agent_id <> ''
ORDER BY transfer_count ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
